# Vlad Rosioru

> Software Development Manager, Engineering Manager and Engineering Leader based in
> Bucharest, Romania, with 20+ years in software engineering. Currently available
> and actively open to hire.

## Summary
- **Name:** Vlad Rosioru
- **Location:** Bucharest, Romania (open to on-site, remote, or relocation)
- **Availability:** Available now — actively open to hire
- **Experience:** 20+ years in software engineering; led/coordinated global
  cross-functional teams of 15–20 people
- **Domains:** fintech, industrial automation, enterprise platforms, cloud-native
- **Contact:** vlad.rosioru@gmail.com · https://www.linkedin.com/in/vlad-rosioru
- **Website:** https://vladrosioru.github.io/

## Open to
Software Development Manager, Engineering Manager, Delivery Manager, and Team Lead
roles — leading or coordinating software development teams, projects and
departments. Also open to collaboration roles in coordination, analysis, or
implementation. Particularly in fintech, enterprise SaaS, and cloud-native platforms.

## Core expertise
- Engineering & delivery management, team leadership, building Agile teams from scratch
- Agile / Scrum, SDLC, change & release management, stakeholder management
- Hiring, evaluation, onboarding, mentoring; cross-cultural team coordination
- Business analysis, requirements gathering, user-story writing
- Hands-on: C# / .NET, CI/CD; Cloud: Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform
- Tools: Jira, Confluence, ServiceNow, GitHub, Azure DevOps

## Selected experience
- **Freelance — Tech Consultant & R&D** (Jan 2025 – Present, Bucharest / Remote):
  R&D in AI and cloud tooling; consulting to improve business processes.
- **LSEG (London Stock Exchange Group)** (Jul 2022 – Dec 2024): Software Development
  Manager and Lead .NET Developer; Scrum Master for a global team of 15–20; led
  an AWS→Azure migration.
- **Qualysoft / BNP Paribas** (Oct 2020 – Jun 2022): Development Team Lead and Developer.
- **Yokogawa** (2011 – 2020): Lead Software Developer and Agile Transformation Lead in
  industrial automation; introduced software-development processes and Agile from scratch.

## Education
- Bachelor's in Computer Science & Engineering, University Politehnica of Bucharest
- Continuous professional development in cloud architecture (Azure, AWS, GCP) and Agile facilitation

## Languages
English, Romanian
